name: Lowepro PRO Trekker BP 550 AW II
description: The gray, 40L Pro Trekker BP 550 AW II Backpack from Lowepro is ideal for protecting your gear during travel.

features.Key Features :: Holds Pro DSLR/Mirrorless Bodies | High Abrasion 500D Polyester | Holds Lenses, Flash, & Accessories | Holds 15" Laptop & 10" Tablet | Adjustable MaxFit Divider System | Detachable Lid Converts to Carry-On | Removable Waist Belt & Gear Box | Exterior Tripod Holder/Accessory Straps | All-Weather Cover Included | Made from Recycled Materials
features.What's in The Box :: Lowepro Pro Trekker BP 550 AW II Backpack (Gray, 40L) | Waist Belt | Set of Interior Dividers | Rain Cover | Gear Box | 2 x Accessory Strap
